tools.name: solana_trade_verdict
tools.description: ONE call, one decision: should this exact SPL trade go through? Composes rug check + honeypot sell-sim + fee weather (+ wallet drainer-scan) → signed PROCEED|PROCEED_WITH_CAPS|ABORT with max_safe_size_usd (exit-liquidity position cap). 47% off a-la-carte. $0.25 USDC (Solana x402).

tools.name: solana_rug_check
tools.description: Solana token safety / rug check BEFORE you sign an SPL swap: mint/freeze authority, Token-2022 traps, holder concentration + rugcheck depth (rugged flag, LP lock, insider networks, liquidity) → signed PROCEED|CAUTION|BLOCK + grade A-F. $0.10 USDC (Solana x402).

tools.name: solana_rug_check_lite
tools.description: LITE $0.02 rug check — same engine, verdict-only: PROCEED|CAUTION|BLOCK + grade + rugged flag + top reasons. Cheapest pre-buy gate on the rail.

tools.name: solana_honeypot_sell_sim
tools.description: Can you actually SELL it after you buy? Live two-way Jupiter round-trip detects honeypots, sell tax, exit slippage → PROCEED|CAUTION|BLOCK. Never ALLOW from a partial. $0.15 USDC.

tools.name: solana_safe_launch_watchlist
tools.description: Fresh Solana launches with a rug verdict overlaid — the daily habit feed for snipers. Top-10, coverage-labeled. $0.05 USDC.

tools.name: solana_address_risk
tools.description: Wallet risk profile: age/activity, error rate, holdings, ACTIVE token delegates (drainer scan) → flags + verdict. $0.10 USDC.

tools.name: solana_tx_preflight
tools.description: Will this transaction SUCCEED or REVERT? simulateTransaction preflight: verdict, revert reason, programs invoked (labeled; unknown programs flagged), compute units. Input = base64 wire tx. $0.10 USDC.

tools.name: solidus_risk_ritual
tools.description: Pre-trade judge: regime + structural break + Solana fee weather → ok|caution|abort with confidence. $0.30 USDC.

tools.name: solidus_decision_loop
tools.description: Composed policy brain: regime + break + fee weather + risk → one action envelope for an autonomous loop. $0.35 USDC.

tools.name: solana_fee_weather
tools.description: Solana priority-fee congestion regime: CALM|HOT|SPIKE + suggested compute-unit price + defer hint. $0.22 USDC.
